name: Deep Inquiry
description: Subterranean drone rising to ask a question

prompts.label: subterranean drone rising with contemplative inquiry
prompts.text: subterranean drone rising with contemplative inquiry, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: deep earth tone ascending with questioning vibration
prompts.text: deep earth tone ascending with questioning vibration, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: cave resonance shifting upward with mysterious intent
prompts.text: cave resonance shifting upward with mysterious intent, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: underground stream echo creating natural question phrase
prompts.text: underground stream echo creating natural question phrase, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: geological hum bending upward through layers of stone
prompts.text: geological hum bending upward through layers of stone, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
